title: TallTalesRP Hats and Horns
description: A bunch of hats and horns for the server TallTalesRP and it will be updated Daily
body:
hello MJ here this is my first ever texture pack for the server TallTalesRP or TTRP

Transform your Minecraft experience with this innovative texture pack! With this pack, your items won’t just sit there looking static—they’ll come to life with unique models that change based on the name you give them. Simply rename an item using an anvil, and watch it transform before your eyes! Whether you're crafting weapons, tools, or other items, the new name will trigger a model update, offering endless customization and variety.

Carved Pumpkin renamed it to Bull Horns = Bull Horns Model and Carved Pumpkin renamed it Green Antler = Green Tall Antler and more 

and more to come soon please wait for update![Horns Examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f362c460933e62a35d20321b874850e878b4cb7c.png)
